response.justification: Strong fullstack engineer with 13+ years of experience across Node.js/TypeScript backends, React-adjacent frontends, and AWS, comfortably exceeding the 6+ year bar. Recent re:cinq role covers TypeScript/Node and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), which directly aligns with the AI agent and primary stack requirements. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, limited React depth in recent roles (Ember.js is more prominent), and no Kotlin — but the breadth, craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD), and AI tooling experience make this a clear interview.
strengths: 13+ years fullstack across TypeScript/Node.js, AWS, MongoDB
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
React experience is light; recent frontend leans Ember.js and Dlang
No Kotlin/Java exposure for the secondary backend stack
